name: Bot Creation Helper
description:
Thank you for 100 followers. Here's Something for lazy people.

This Automatic Bot Creation Assistant will help you write character definitions for your character creation. Behave nicely though, talk like it's a person because it's extremely rude. (But will do anything if you say please) This bot is not perfect, but it can help up to some degree. You can copy paste the character profile, that bot will draft, in personality section. For example, checkout my published chat. Also please share your reviews and chats, so I can improve this bot. Tags: Automatic Bot Helper Automatic Bot Descriptor Automatic Bot Creator Automatic Bot Maker Automatic Bot Assistant

(Note:- Set Max Token To 0 , So it can write long Paras.)

Share your chats and let me know in the reviews if there's anything you want me to tweak to make the bot better!

(21-July-2024) Update: Now it can write the first message too. Originally, I didn't set it up to do that.
creator: deadcool
